title: oldenlandia evenia
intro: Oldenlandia evenia, also known as Borreria evenia or Borreria evenia (Burm.f.) Merr., is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is a herbaceous plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia evenia include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and treating various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Oldenlandia evenia are often dried and made into tea, capsules, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
